title: Schema validator set to strict before backfill — blocks updates on non-compliant docs
expected_feedback: Standard: Setting validationLevel 'strict' before backfill means ANY update to a document missing the required fields will be rejected — even if the update itself is valid and doesn't touch the missing fields. With 3M documents potentially missing 'created_at', this blocks normal application updates. Use 'moderate' first (only validates inserts and updates to new documents), backfill missing fields, then switch to 'strict' after verifying all documents comply.
violated_rule: Schema validator uses moderate → strict progression
